experience_chunks.description: Business analyst at a consulting firm, working primarily with retail and CPG clients. Conducted business diagnostics, process re-engineering work, and digital transformation strategy projects.
Senior accounting role at a mid-sized company — month-end close, financial reporting, statutory compliance (GAAP / Ind-AS), and tax filings at Globex Inc.

Designed and implemented cloud infrastructure using AWS, Terraform, and Kubernetes. Managed CI/CD pipelines and monitoring stack.
Test automated and QA engineered for a fintech product using Selenium, pytest, and Locust.
Cloud infrastructure and DevOps work at an enterprise SaaS company at HCL.

Business Analyst at Wipro, working on AI-strategy advisory.
Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM at Dream11.
Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months at Razorpay.
Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store at Aganitha.
Managed daily fulfillment operations across 3 warehouses, leading a team of 80 and driving a 22% productivity gain.
Handled customer support operations, owned KPIs, and led continuous improvement initiatives.
